rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JOSE LUIS MALDONADO
rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 12/16/19 for an appearance for the Court to determine if bond should be reduced when the Administrator has full IAEA authority and the real property is reportedly being prepared for sale. There are as yet reportedly no funds to deposit into blocked accounts (other than the approx. $14,000 received from the conservator). Furthermore, a personal representative or her attorney has the duty to petition immediately to increase bond upon becoming aware of the need to increase bond. [CRC 7.204.] Notice may not be served before the filing of the pleading requiring notice. [LRSF 14.21 A.]

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CARL EDWARD GALLAGHER
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 12/23/19. No earlier date available. No courtesy copy of the second amended petition has been provided. [LRSF 2.7 B. and 14.93 G.] No proposed order has been submitted. [LRSF 14.6 A.] An amending pleading requires the same notice as the pleading it amends. [CRC 7.53(a).] Notice may not be served before the pleading requiring notice is filed. [LRSF 14.21 A.] No proof of publication has been filed. Courtesy copies of the second amended petition, proof of service, proof of publication, and declaration re real property and a proposed order must be received by the reviewing Examiner by no later than 12/16/19 to be considered. If not provided or if there are still defects, an appearance will be required for the Court to determine if the matter should be taken off calendar. (The objections filed on 9/13/19 have been reviewed.)
